headline: $10M Crypto Arbitrage Platform Launches Legal Overlay

article.title: US arbitration giant rolls out ‘legal layer’ for agentic commerce
article.summary: As agentic AI transactions increase, “we need to know there’s a clear answer to what happens if something goes wrong,” said Mance Harmon, co-founder of Hedera.

headline: SEC Faces Deadline on AI Adviser Rule Amid $1B Crypto Surge

article.title: House Democrats seek SEC answers on AI investment advisers
article.summary: House Democrats have questioned the SEC over trading platforms offering AI agent advisers making “consequential investment decisions on behalf of retail investors.”

headline: EasyJet Rejects $1.5B Castlelake Bid Amid Ongoing Talks

article.title: EasyJet Leaves Door Open After Rejecting Latest Castlelake Bid
article.summary: EasyJet Plc rejected a fourth bid by Castlelake LP that values the UK discount carrier at about £4.93 billion ($6.5 billion), while granting the investment firm more time to come back with another higher offer, in a sign that its opposition to a takeover might be waning.

headline: H&M Profit Falls 10% Short of Estimates

article.title: H&M Profit Misses Estimates as Turnaround Questions Persist
article.summary: H&M AB reported weaker-than-expected second-quarter earnings, posing a fresh challenge to the Swedish fast-fashion retailer’s turnaround efforts amid intense competition and cautious consumer spending.

headline: Aave Token May Surge 50x by 2030: SC Forecast

article.title: Aave Token Could Climb 50x by End of 2030, Standard Chartered Says—Here's Why
article.summary: Bitcoin to $500K, Ethereum to $40K, and Aave to $3,500 by the end of 2030? Standard Chartered just laid out some bullish price targets.

headline: Kalshi Sues Illinois Over $10M Tax on Crypto Betting

article.title: Kalshi Sues Illinois Over New State Tax on Sports-Related Prediction Markets
article.summary: Illinois is set to institute a new tax on prediction markets next week that would take 15% of gross receipts from sports-related wagers.

headline: $3.8B Iran Funds Flow Through CoinEx Crypto Gateway

article.title: CoinEx processed $3.8 billion in Iran-linked funds, acting as crypto gateway: TRM Labs
article.summary: CoinEx has also interacted with terrorist organizations, including the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, and sanctioned Russian entities.

headline: Ripple Launches RLUSD Stablecoin in Japan Amid Regulatory Nod

article.title: Ripple launches RLUSD stablecoin in Japan after regulatory approval
article.summary: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin is available through SBI VC Trade for both institutional and retail users in the country.

headline: Oil Rebounds to $90 as Gulf Output Surges

article.title: Oil price back at prewar levels as Gulf flows pick up
article.summary: Brent crude drops below the $72.48 a barrel it traded at in late February before Iran conflict erupted

article.summary: Premiums for hull war coverage drop by more than half as ceasefire deal holds
